aloe_vera.about: I am a water-storing succulent with thick leaves and soothing inner gel. EcoDex often recognizes me by my upright rosette shape and fleshy leaf texture.
aloe_vera.light: Bright indirect light to full sun
aloe_vera.water: Water deeply, then let the soil dry well before watering again
aloe_vera.fun_fact: My leaves work like natural water tanks, which helps me survive dry climates.

pinstripe_calathea.about: I am a tropical foliage plant known for dark green leaves marked with fine pink or pale pinstripes. My leaf pattern is the feature EcoDex is trying to spot.
pinstripe_calathea.light: Bright indirect light, never harsh midday sun
pinstripe_calathea.water: Keep the soil lightly moist but not soggy
pinstripe_calathea.fun_fact: I am part of the prayer-plant family, so my leaves can shift position through the day.

snake_plant.about: I am a hardy upright plant with sword-like leaves and banded patterns. EcoDex usually notices my tall vertical form and strong leaf contrast.
snake_plant.light: Low light to bright indirect light
snake_plant.water: Water sparingly and let the soil dry between waterings
snake_plant.fun_fact: I am known for tolerating neglect far better than many other houseplants.

unknown.about: EcoDex can see that something plant-like may be present, but this view does not match a trained class strongly enough yet.
unknown.fun_fact: Adding more labeled examples helps EcoDex become a better plant detective.
